overall.description: Cinematic game footage from a third-person perspective showing a character walking through a rainy, gas-lit historic town at night. The scene features wet cobblestone streets, historic brick buildings with balconies, and atmospheric fog with warm lamplight reflecting off puddles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway opening to tree-lined park square

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open park area with oak trees
character steps from sheltered porch onto rain-slicked cobblestones

agents.ego_description: character in dark coat and hat walking steadily from covered shelter into the open rainy street

entered.detail: wooden roof structure with support columns providing shelter from rain
cast iron lamp post with warm yellow glow illuminating the mist
large tree with spreading branches silhouetted against lamplight
wrought iron fence bordering the park area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a covered wooden walkway looking out into a rainy night. Gas lamps cast warm light through the mist, illuminating large oak trees and wet cobblestones. The character walks forward from the shelter into the open park area as rain falls steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic town intersection with muddy cobblestones

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left side of the street
character turns left to cross the muddy cobblestone intersection

agents.ego_description: character walks across the muddy cobblestone intersection, passing a stationary carriage and moving toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with large wooden wheels parked at the curb

entered.detail: black wooden carriage with large spoked wheels and covered cabin
multi-story brick building with arched windows at the street corner

segments.scene_description: Moving into a wide open intersection, the character crosses the muddy cobblestones past a parked horse-drawn carriage. Historic brick buildings line the streets, their windows glowing with warm light. The rain continues to fall, creating reflections in the puddles.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with tram tracks

events.description: rain intensifies with visible streaks illuminated by street lamps
red tram passes by in the distance on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: character continues down the sidewalk alongside a stone wall, passing under street lamps as rain falls steadily

notable_agents.action: red tram moving slowly down the street with illuminated windows

entered.detail: low brick retaining wall with decorative iron railing on top
red and yellow vintage streetcar with glowing interior lights
empty wooden crate sitting in a rain puddle on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a sidewalk bordered by a stone wall as the rain intensifies. A red tram passes in the distance on the left, its windows glowing. Street lamps line the path, casting long reflections on the wet cobblestones.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street corner with bakery

events.description: character slows and turns slightly to survey the street corner
passing close to a bright gas lamp creating lens flare and glare

agents.ego_description: character approaches a street corner, slowing to look around the historic district with rain continuing to fall

entered.detail: red painted sign with white lettering reading BAKERY on building facade
three-story brick building with arched doorway and shuttered windows

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street corner, the character passes a building with a red BAKERY sign. The ornate brick architecture features arched doorways and glowing windows. The rain continues to fall steadily as the character explores the corner, passing close to a bright gas lamp that creates a warm glare.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shelter of a wooden walkway into the heart of a rainy, gas-lit historic town. It begins under a covered porch looking out into the mist, moving forward past large oak trees and wet cobblestones as the character enters an open park area. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, the scene expands to reveal a parked horse-drawn carriage and glowing windows of brick buildings reflecting in muddy puddles. The path then shifts along a stone-bordered sidewalk where the rain intensifies and a red tram glides past in the distance. Finally, the movement leads toward a street corner, passing an ornate bakery with a red sign and a bright gas lamp that casts a warm glare over the arched doorways.
